title: Ingersoll Rand Announces Addition of Julie Schertell and JoAnna Sohovich to Board of Directors
text: DAVIDSON, N.C.--(BUSINESS WIRE)--Ingersoll Rand Inc. (NYSE:IR), a global provider of mission-critical flow creation and industrial solutions, today announced the appointment of Julie Schertell and JoAnna Sohovich to its Board of Directors effective October 2, 2023. Schertell currently serves as the president and chief executive officer (CEO) for Mativ (NYSE: MATV), a leading global manufacturer of specialty materials, and serves on its Board of Directors. She brings more than three decades of e.

title: Ingersoll Rand to Host Investor and Analyst Meeting on November 30, 2023
text: DAVIDSON, N.C.--(BUSINESS WIRE)--Ingersoll Rand Inc. (NYSE:IR), a global provider of mission-critical flow creation and industrial solutions, invites investors, analysts, and other stakeholders to join its Investor and Analyst meeting on Thursday, November 30, 2023. The event will be held at the New York Stock Exchange (NYSE) in New York, NY and via webcast. The meeting will provide an in-depth review of the company's business and financial strategy and vision, including competitive differentia.
